description: Set the working directory. This setting defaults to the location of the current project file.

keywords.name: custom
keywords.description: The working directory is set to s .

keywords.name: engine
keywords.description: Set the working directory to the location of the main engine module (dll).

keywords.name: executable
keywords.description: Set the working directory to the executable directory, or the directory where the application is stored.

keywords.name: input
keywords.description: Set the working directory to the location of the current input data file.

keywords.name: project
keywords.description: The working directory is set to the location of the current project directory. This is the default.
